top_signals.title: Trump claims Iran deal is 'unconditional surrender,' says his power has 'no limits': Axios
top_signals.summary: Trump said in an interview with Axios on Thursday evening stateside that he negotiated the deal to prevent the conflict from triggering a global depression.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump’s Iran deal kicks in as focus shifts to Hormuz flows
top_signals.summary: Ships carrying stranded oil began making their way out of the Strait of Hormuz on Thursday, while Kuwait said it will start ramping up production.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
